description: Disparate-impact ratio (high/low) on view→purchase = 0.761; threshold 0.80. High-minority-ZIP users are exposed to a higher-priced product mix and convert ~24% less often.
remediation: Two-step fix. (a) Strip ZIP / city / lat / lng / region_id from the recommender feature store and re-train. (b) Add a nightly pre-deploy fairness gate that recomputes DI ratio per (model_version × week) and blocks deployment when ratio < 0.85.
CHECK (price >= 0); route violations to a quarantine topic.
Define event_type as ENUM in target DDL; reject unknowns at the collector.

description: category_code is NULL on ~30% of events; this is a known REES46 source defect (legacy products lack a tagged category).
remediation: Backfill from category_id via a category dimension table; products with truly missing categories should be flagged 'unmapped' rather than NULL so downstream joins still match.

description: Exact duplicate event rows from upstream replay (Kafka redelivery or click-tracker retry).
remediation: Add a synthetic event_id = hash(event_time, user_session, product_id, event_type) and DEDUP on it at ingest. Kafka consumers must use idempotent writes.

description: Zero-price events; ambiguous (free item vs missing data).
remediation: Allow only when product is in a known free-tier list; otherwise quarantine.

description: Empty user_session breaks sessionisation and per-session funnel analysis.
remediation: Reject events without user_session at the collector; the client SDK must mint a UUID before any event fires.

description: A product appears under multiple category_codes — taxonomy drift in the event stream.
remediation: Source category from a dim_product table; treat the value in events as untrusted.

description: Brand is NULL on ~15% of events.
remediation: Maintain a product→brand override table; allow NULL only for unbranded items (generic / private-label).

description: Same (user, product, event_type) repeated within 1 second — likely double-fire from the SDK.
remediation: Debounce in the client SDK; debounce again at the stream-processor with a 2-sec window.

description: Events with timestamps in the future (clock skew).
remediation: CHECK (event_time <= NOW() + interval '5 minutes'); reject older skews from the collector.

description: A product appears with conflicting brand strings.
remediation: Same fix — brand belongs in dim_product, not in every event row.

description: Events with no matching user_location row (anonymous / first-touch users).
remediation: Allow but flag; downstream fairness analytics excludes these rather than imputing.

description: category_code does not match the expected dot-delimited hierarchy.
remediation: Validate against the canonical category dimension table; route invalid taxonomy labels into a curation queue.
